versionMetadata.name: v3.1-scraper-fix
versionMetadata.description:
Email Scraper v3.1 — enrichment layer now functional

Fixes:
- Removed JSON.stringify on rpc_body (was causing double-encoding; RPC writes silently failed)
- PostgREST NULL filter corrected (or=(lead_type.is.null,lead_type.neq.test))
- Email filter covers both NULL and empty string
- Personal email blacklist (exact domain match for gmail/outlook/yahoo/hotmail)
- Placeholder locals filtered (jane, user, test, admin, etc.)
- Hex-hash local parts filtered (Sentry fingerprints)
- Domain relevance check (email domain must match website base domain)
- Empty string guard (returns null instead of writing "")
- Expanded blacklist domains (sentry.io, mysite.com, indiantypefoundry.com, etc.)

Verified:
- First live run enriched 38/49 leads with real business emails
- Second run after blacklist tuning eliminated junk patterns
- 2,155 leads backfilled with website column ready for processing

Schedule: every 1 hour, batch size 50
Throughput: ~1,200 leads/day
Backlog clears in ~2 days
